goal_summary: Build a fully functional, locally runnable or deployed personal finance tracking web application using React and Node.js within 4 weeks.

tasks.title: Read on database modeling for transactions, categories, and users (Relational or NoSQL)
Set up Node.js with Express, connect to database, and build CRUD routes for transactions
Implement basic JWT authentication middleware and test routes using Postman
Quiz on RESTful API best practices and Node.js security patterns
Initialize React project using Vite, set up React Router, and establish folder structure
Build UI components: transaction list, transaction entry form, and balance overview using Tailwind CSS
Implement global state management using React Context API to manage user authentication and transaction states
Review core React hooks and unidirectional data flow concepts
Integrate React frontend with Express backend using Axios, managing CORS and HTTP interceptors
Integrate Chart.js or Recharts to visualize spending categories and monthly income vs expense trends
Add form validation, loading skeletons, and interactive success/error notification banners
Implement filtering by date/category and budget alerts on the frontend
Secure sensitive data using dotenv, configure environment variables, and perform security cleanup
Deploy frontend to Vercel/Netlify, backend to Render/Railway, and provision a live cloud database
Final verification: complete a self-evaluation checklist on app security and responsive layout
